author: codex-agent

patch.value: Parent feature for end-to-end implementation and verification of pm context.
Implement context command runtime and surfaces
Build the new context command, wire CLI and integrations, and cover behavior with unit/integration/runtime tests and docs.
Context command, alias, completion, Pi wrapper, tests, and docs are shipped with deterministic behavior and no regressions.
Epic exists, implementation files and verification surfaces are identified.
Single-command context retrieval for next-work decisions
Reduces command-chaining overhead for agents and maintainers
Context command available across CLI and wrapper surfaces
Feature request requires coordinated runtime and contract updates.
Faster and more reliable project-state triage
